name: Support ticket triage
description: Route an inbound support ticket to one category label from a fixed set: billing, bug, feature_request, account, integration. The label must be exactly one of those tokens — a classification demo where a precise model obviously beats a chatty one.

examples.input_text: Categorize this support ticket into exactly one of: billing, bug, feature_request, account, integration. Reply with only the label. Ticket: "I was charged twice for my March subscription and need a refund for the duplicate."

Categorize this support ticket into exactly one of: billing, bug, feature_request, account, integration. Reply with only the label. Ticket: "The export button throws a 500 error every time I click it on the reports page."

Categorize this support ticket into exactly one of: billing, bug, feature_request, account, integration. Reply with only the label. Ticket: "It would be great if you could add a dark mode to the dashboard."

Categorize this support ticket into exactly one of: billing, bug, feature_request, account, integration. Reply with only the label. Ticket: "I can't log in — the password reset email never arrives and my account is locked."

Categorize this support ticket into exactly one of: billing, bug, feature_request, account, integration. Reply with only the label. Ticket: "Our Slack notifications stopped syncing after you pushed the new webhook update."
